title: Swipe right, next screen
scenario: Onboarding screen navigation: swiping right from Continue button advances through screens with dot indicators, all screens must match Figma design
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or clear app data to trigger onboarding).
Observe the first onboarding screen with a 'Continue' button.
Swipe right from the 'Continue' button to advance to the next onboarding screen.
Repeat swiping right from the 'Continue' button on each subsequent screen to navigate through the third, fourth, fifth, and sixth onboarding screens.
Observe the dot indicators at the bottom of each screen to confirm they update correctly as you advance.
Compare each onboarding screen's layout, text, imagery, and button placement against the Figma design specifications.
expected: Swiping right from the Continue button advances through all onboarding screens (third, fourth, fifth, sixth) in sequence. Dot indicators update to reflect the current screen position. All screens match the Figma design in layout, content, and styling.
